name: RefitTrimSectionMode
summary: The mode for dividing the surface into sections

enum_values.name: NoSections
enum_values.summary: just output one "upper" and one "lower" surface

enum_values.name: DivideAtInputKnots
enum_values.summary: divide into sections at each of the input surface's existing knots

enum_values.name: DivideAtAddedKnots
enum_values.summary: Yes, divide into sections at each of the "nKnot" added knot values

enum_values.name: DivideAtAllKnots
enum_values.summary: Yes, divide into sections at ALL knot values (i.e. both 1 and 2)
